section.title: Classic PreTeXt XML
section.p:
This section is written in classic PreTeXt XML markup. While LaTeX-style PreTeXt is easier to read and write, classic PreTeXt XML gives you access to the full power of PreTeXt!
\left|\sum_{i=0}^n a_i\right|\leq\sum_{i=0}^n|a_i|

statement.p: For more information on PreTeXt, visit .
